name: Florida Golf Supply
about: Flipwedge ProSim is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Melbourne, FL, offering access to Foresight Falcon simulators with over 1,000 world-class courses and advanced data tracking. The venue provides a mix of casual play, structured lessons with certified coaches, and a pro shop for club fitting and trade-ins. Pricing is flexible with half-hour bay rentals starting at $20, alongside membership options for unlimited access and discounted lessons, making it suitable for both casual golfers and serious players looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Instant feedback on ball speed, launch angle, spin rate, and club path
Access to legendary courses like Pebble Beach in a hyper-realistic environment
Flexible booking options and personalized coaching from certified instructors

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end simulator with advanced ball tracking and data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides quality equipment to borrow or try, including custom fitting options if you're ready for an upgrade.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service being available on-site, and no explicit mention of BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While the exact time for 18 holes isn't specified, sessions are booked by the half-hour, with 4-person groups sharing a bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is suitable for families, with flexible group bookings and a welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels.
